series_metadata.series_title: Records of Licensed or Registered HME facilities
series_metadata.series_description: Original Applications, supporting documents, insurance certificates copy of certificates, final inspection reports and compliance response letters with documentation, correspondence, copies of adjudication orders, copies of consent agreements, copies of opportunity for hearing notices.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Two years following notification of closure of facility ; Paper: Two years following notification of closure of facility or scanned as machine readable
